subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of Beauty, and the hour belongeth to the Sovereign of Glory; yet have I taken up the pen to set forth the truths of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم جمالست و ساعت متعلق بسلطان جلال لکن قلم تحریر برداشتم که مطالب حب تقریر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
